home.hero_desc: P.E.T automatically designs precise workout and nutrition roadmaps based on your biological metrics and unique goals. A single platform to build your physique.
home.calorie_desc: The AI system automatically analyzes calorie expenditure based on form accuracy and workout intensity. Every metric is strictly calculated.
home.modal_p1: According to WHO, 31% of global adults don't meet minimum physical activity levels, increasing risks of cardiovascular diseases and obesity. In Vietnam, fitness demand is surging but trainees face barriers:
home.modal_li1: Lack of scientific & personalized guidance: Self-training without proper roadmaps often leads to poor form, loss of direction, and injury risks.
home.modal_li2: Hard to maintain motivation: About 50% of beginners quit within the first 6 months due to a lack of visible results.
home.modal_li3: High costs: Hiring a Personal Trainer (PT) typically costs $150-$400/month, far exceeding many people's budgets.
home.modal_p2: P.E.T was created to solve these issues by providing a personalized virtual trainer, accompanying you on your journey to improve your physique scientifically and cost-effectively!

roadmap.subtitle: Conquer every milestone to reach your goal
roadmap.generating_desc: Your AI coach is designing a personal 28-day roadmap based on your body stats and goal. This takes about a minute, please stay on this page!
roadmap.use_default_hint: AI generation will stop and you will get the standard roadmap for your profile right away.

daily.subtitle: BURN CALORIES, EARN POINTS
daily.click_checkin: CLICK TO CHECK IN & CLAIM REWARD
daily.rest_day_desc: Your roadmap gives you a break today — let your muscles recover and come back tomorrow!

calorie_tracker.title: CALORIES MANAGEMENT
calorie_tracker.start_workout: Start working out to let AI track it!

pet_profile.hello_ai: Hey there! Do you need advice on workouts or nutrition?
pet_profile.auto_reply: This is an automated response from AI. Keep focusing on your weights!
pet_profile.chat_error: I'm a bit busy right now — please send your message again in a moment!
pet_profile.work_hard: ✨ Work hard on your missions to level up!
pet_profile.charity_desc: Use your workout points to do good things for the community.

exercise_list.pace_msg: Workout at your own pace. Confirm when done.
exercise_list.time_msg: Finish countdown to end the Set.

daily_workout.locked_desc: Fully complete the previous workout day, then come back tomorrow to continue your roadmap!
daily_workout.need_checkin_title: Check in to start a new day
daily_workout.need_checkin_desc: You need to check in today before today's roadmap workout is unlocked.
daily_workout.quote_1: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
daily_workout.quote_3: You don't have to be perfect, just better than yesterday.
daily_workout.quote_4: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
daily_workout.quote_5: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going. Keep moving!
daily_workout.completed_msg: You have completed your workout session
daily_workout.exp_limit_warning: You have reached the maximum EXP limit for today. You can still work out but won't earn more EXP until tomorrow.
daily_workout.exp_received: Your PET has received extra EXP!
daily_workout.benefits_default: Develop {{group}}, improve endurance and burn fat.

auth.login_welcome: Welcome back to your personal trainer P.E.T.
auth.register_welcome: Start your smart fitness journey with AI today.
auth.google_cancelled: Google sign-in was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
auth.inapp_warning: You are viewing this page inside an app (Zalo/Facebook/Messenger...). Google blocks sign-in in embedded browsers — tap ⋯ and choose "Open in browser" (Chrome/Safari), then sign in again.
auth.popup_blocked: Your browser blocked the Google sign-in popup. Use the Google button below, or allow pop-ups for this site and try again.
auth.feature_1_desc: Get real-time feedback via camera to correct your posture, minimizing injuries.
auth.feature_2_desc: The system automatically sets up and updates the best workout plan for your body stats.
auth.feature_3_desc: Track calories burned and analyze workout efficiency visually through vivid charts.

roadmap_data.desc_rest: Rest at the tavern, recover your strength, and check your gear for the next battle.
roadmap_data.desc_chest: Use upper body strength to smash through the Fat Legion's shields.
roadmap_data.desc_back: Focus your pulling power to take down the giant obstacle.
roadmap_data.desc_legs: Leg strength is the only thing that will get you out of the swamp of laziness.
roadmap_data.desc_shoulders: A solid core will help you withstand the crushing pressure.
roadmap_data.desc_full: Use every muscle group to defeat the strongest gatekeeper in the area.
roadmap_data.desc_cardio: Heart rate and stamina are the keys to surviving this encirclement.
roadmap_data.desc_special: Face mysterious challenges in the fog.

exercises.desc_101: Comprehensive exercise for the chest, shoulders, and triceps. Maximize chest stretch when lowering, then explosively push up. Enhances upper body endurance and strength.
exercises.safety_101: ⚠️ NOTE: Keep arms at a 45-degree angle to your body (never flare to 90 degrees to avoid rotator cuff tears). Squeeze your core and glutes to keep your back flat like a board, avoid lower back arching.
exercises.desc_102: Focuses deeply on the inner chest and triceps.
exercises.desc_103: Increases chest muscle mass, balances strength on both sides.
exercises.desc_201: The classic exercise to build the lats (V-taper), middle back, and stimulate the biceps. Pull your entire body weight up using back strength until your chin clears the bar.
exercises.safety_201: ⚠️ NOTE: When lowering, do not completely relax the shoulder joint (loose dead hang); maintain some tension in the shoulder blades to protect the joint. Brace your core to prevent swinging.
exercises.desc_202: Improves hunched posture, tones the upper back.
exercises.desc_501: Isolation exercise for the rectus abdominis (six-pack). Instead of sitting all the way up, just curl your shoulders and upper back off the floor, squeezing the abs at the top.
exercises.safety_501: ⚠️ NOTE: Hands should lightly touch behind the head, DO NOT pull your neck forward (risk of cervical injury). Keep an apple-sized gap between chin and chest. Lower back must stay flat on the floor.
exercises.desc_502: Develops the core comprehensively, enhances spinal endurance.
exercises.desc_601: The 'king' of lower body exercises, building quads, hamstrings, and glutes. The movement simulates sitting in an invisible chair behind you and standing up by pushing through the heels.
exercises.safety_601: ⚠️ NOTE: Keep back naturally straight, chest up. When lowering, knees must track outward over your toes, DO NOT let knees cave in (to protect ligaments). Weight should be on your heels.
exercises.desc_801: Ultimate balancing skill, excellent for shoulders and body control.
exercises.desc_802: Explosive strength, a combination of pull-up and dip.
exercises.group_1_desc: Develop your chest fully. AI will automatically score your form.
exercises.group_2_desc: Chiseled back, build a solid posture.
exercises.group_3_desc: Broad shoulders, improve upper body strength.
exercises.group_8_desc: Challenge your body with advanced skills.

schedule.description: Complete any exercise and the system will automatically mark the training day. Click on any day to note your feelings.
schedule.do_exercise_to_record: Complete an exercise to record automatically!
schedule.note_placeholder: Note your feelings, goals, or anything you want to remember...
